---
title: "Cross sectional for nhanes"
author: "Chenglin Liu"
date: "2025-09-30"
output: html_document
---

# 1.数据读取，包读入. data loading for nhanes

```{r}
setwd('C:/0822/New')
library(MatchIt)
library(cobalt)
library(foreign)
library(dplyr)
library(arsenal)
library(survey)
library(tableone)
library(mgcv)
library(modelsummary)
library(splines)
library(writexl)
library(purrr)
library(car)
library(patchwork)
#write.csv(dat,file='Fulldata_with_mortality.csv',row.names=FALSE)
#dat<-read.csv('AHAmetadata.csv')
dat<-read.csv('nhanes.csv')

dat$outcome_AHA<- case_when(
  dat$AHA>0.075 ~ 1,
  dat$AHA<0.075 ~ 0
)
dat$hypertensionstatus<- case_when(
  dat$Mean_DBP>90 | dat$Mean_SBP >140 ~ 1,
  dat$Hypertensiontreated=='YES' ~1,
  TRUE~ 0
  )
dat$HDL<-dat$HDLCholesterol
table(dat$hypertensionstatus,useNA = 'ifany')
```

# 2.基线描述 baseline

```{r}

target_vars <- c('outcome_AHA')

# 遍历目标变量组
for (target_var in target_vars) {
  # 设置复杂抽样设计
  options(survey.lonely.psu = "adjust")
  study_design <- svydesign(
    data = dat,
    id = ~SDMVPSU,
    strata = ~SDMVSTRA,
    weights = ~weightnew,
    nest = TRUE
  )

  # 定义描述性统计的变量
  vars <- c(
    'age', 'sex', 'race', 'marital', 'education', 'pir','bmi', 'drink',
    'smokingstatus_final', 'diabetes', 'Mean_DBP', 'Mean_SBP', 'hypertensionstatus',
    'TotalCholesterol', 'nonHDL', 'HDLCholesterol', 'ALP', 'ALT', 'LDH', 'GGT', 'AST',
    'Albumin', 'Globulin', 'A.G', 'AST.ALT', 'HbA1c_percentage', 'year','triglyceride','Hypertensiontreated','LDL'
  )
  
  # 定义因子变量
  fvars <- c(
    'sex', 'race', 'marital', 'education', 'year', 'smokingstatus_final', 'diabetes',
     'drink', 'hypertensionstatus','Hypertensiontreated'
  )
  
  # 加权描述性统计表
  Svytabl <- svyCreateTableOne(
    vars = vars,
    strata = target_var,
    data = study_design,
    factorVars = fvars
  )
  weighted_table <- as.data.frame(print(Svytabl, showAllLevels = TRUE))
  write.csv(weighted_table, file = paste0('base_', target_var, '_weighted.csv'))
  
  # 未加权描述性统计表
  Svytabl2 <- CreateTableOne(
    vars = vars,
    strata = target_var,
    data = dat,
    factorVars = fvars
  )
  unweighted_table <- as.data.frame(print(Svytabl2, showAllLevels = TRUE))
  write.csv(unweighted_table, file = paste0('base_', target_var, '_unweighted.csv'))
}
```

# 3. 三分位趋势性分析

```{r}
#dat<-read.csv('AHAmetadata.csv')
dat$outcome_AHA<- case_when(
  dat$AHA>0.075 ~ 1,
  dat$AHA<0.075 ~ 0
)
dat$hypertensionstatus<- case_when(
  dat$Mean_DBP>90 | dat$Mean_SBP >140 ~ 1,
  dat$Hypertensiontreated=='YES' ~1,
  TRUE~ 0
  )
target_vars <- c('outcome_AHA')
variables <- c('ALP', 'ALT', 'LDH', 'GGT', 'AST', 'Albumin', 'Globulin', 'AST.ALT', 'A.G')
#dat <- dat %>%
#  mutate(across(c(ALT, ALP, LDH, GGT, AST, Albumin, Globulin), log))

options(survey.lonely.psu = "adjust")
study_design <- svydesign(
  data = dat,
  id = ~SDMVPSU,
  strata = ~SDMVSTRA,
  weights = ~weightnew,
  nest = TRUE
)

sensitivity_results <- data.frame(
  outcome = character(),
  var = character(),
  t1_range = character(),
  t2_range = character(),
  t3_range = character(),
  t1_count_low = numeric(),
  t2_count_low = numeric(),
  t3_count_low = numeric(),
  t1_count_high = numeric(),
  t2_count_high = numeric(),
  t3_count_high = numeric(),
  t1_median = numeric(),
  t2_median = numeric(),
  t3_median = numeric(),
  OR_t2 = numeric(),
  CI_t2_lower = numeric(),
  CI_t2_upper = numeric(),
  p_t2 = numeric(),
  OR_t3 = numeric(),
  CI_t3_lower = numeric(),
  CI_t3_upper = numeric(),
  p_t3 = numeric(),
  OR_continuous = numeric(),
  CI_continuous_lower = numeric(),
  CI_continuous_upper = numeric(),
  p_continuous = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (target_var in target_vars) {
  for (var in variables) {
    quantiles <- quantile(dat[[var]], probs = c(0, 1/3, 2/3, 1), na.rm = TRUE)

    # 创建等级变量（3段）
    dat[[paste0(var, "_ordinal")]] <- cut(
      dat[[var]],
      breaks = quantiles,
      include.lowest = TRUE,
      labels = c(1, 2, 3)
    )

    # 区间范围和人数统计
    t1_range <- sprintf("[%.2f, %.2f]", quantiles[1], quantiles[2])
    t2_range <- sprintf("(%.2f, %.2f]", quantiles[2], quantiles[3])
    t3_range <- sprintf("(%.2f, %.2f]", quantiles[3], quantiles[4])
    #
    high<-subset(dat,subset=dat$outcome_AHA==1)
    low<- subset(dat,subset = dat$outcome_AHA==0)
    t1_count_low <- sum(low[[var]] <= quantiles[2], na.rm = TRUE)
    t2_count_low <- sum(low[[var]] > quantiles[2] & low[[var]] <= quantiles[3], na.rm = TRUE)
    t3_count_low <- sum(low[[var]] > quantiles[3], na.rm = TRUE)
    t1_count_high <- sum(high[[var]] <= quantiles[2], na.rm = TRUE)
    t2_count_high <- sum(high[[var]] > quantiles[2] & high[[var]] <= quantiles[3], na.rm = TRUE)
    t3_count_high <- sum(high[[var]] > quantiles[3], na.rm = TRUE)
    options(survey.lonely.psu = "adjust")
    study_design <- svydesign(
      data = dat,
      id = ~SDMVPSU,
      strata = ~SDMVSTRA,
      weights = ~weightnew,
      nest = TRUE)
    # 模型 1：等级自变量回归分析（以 t1 为参考组）
    formula_ordinal <- as.formula(paste0(
      target_var, " ~ ", var, "_ordinal+sex+age+pir+education+marital+race+HDLCholesterol+diabetes+
      hypertensionstatus+smokingstatus_final"
    ))
    model_ordinal <- svyglm(formula_ordinal, design = study_design, family = quasibinomial())

    # 提取 OR 和 95% CI
    coef_ordinal <- summary(model_ordinal)$coefficients
    OR_t2 <- exp(coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal2"), "Estimate"])
    CI_t2_lower <- exp(coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal2"), "Estimate"] - 1.96 * coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal2"), "Std. Error"])
    CI_t2_upper <- exp(coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal2"), "Estimate"] + 1.96 * coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal2"), "Std. Error"])
    p_t2 <- coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal2"), "Pr(>|t|)"]

    OR_t3 <- exp(coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal3"), "Estimate"])
    CI_t3_lower <- exp(coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal3"), "Estimate"] - 1.96 * coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal3"), "Std. Error"])
    CI_t3_upper <- exp(coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal3"), "Estimate"] + 1.96 * coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal3"), "Std. Error"])
    p_t3 <- coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal3"), "Pr(>|t|)"]

    # 替换变量值为中位数
    medians <- c(
      median(dat[[var]][dat[[var]] <= quantiles[2]], na.rm = TRUE),
      median(dat[[var]][dat[[var]] > quantiles[2] & dat[[var]] <= quantiles[3]], na.rm = TRUE),
      median(dat[[var]][dat[[var]] > quantiles[3]], na.rm = TRUE)
    )
    dat[[paste0(var, "_continuous")]] <- NA
    dat[[paste0(var, "_continuous")]][dat[[paste0(var, "_ordinal")]] == 1] <- medians[1]
    dat[[paste0(var, "_continuous")]][dat[[paste0(var, "_ordinal")]] == 2] <- medians[2]
    dat[[paste0(var, "_continuous")]][dat[[paste0(var, "_ordinal")]] == 3] <- medians[3]
    options(survey.lonely.psu = "adjust")
    study_design <- svydesign(
      data = dat,
      id = ~SDMVPSU,
      strata = ~SDMVSTRA,
      weights = ~weightnew,
      nest = TRUE)
    # 连续变量回归分析
    formula_continuous <- as.formula(paste0(
      target_var, " ~ ", var, "_continuous+sex+age+pir+education+marital+race+HDLCholesterol+diabetes+
      hypertensionstatus+smokingstatus_final"
    ))
    model_continuous <- svyglm(formula_continuous, design = study_design, family = quasibinomial())

    # 提取连续变量的 OR 和 95% CI
    coef_continuous <- summary(model_continuous)$coefficients
    OR_continuous <- exp(coef_continuous[paste0(var, "_continuous"), "Estimate"])
    CI_continuous_lower <- exp(coef_continuous[paste0(var, "_continuous"), "Estimate"] - 1.96 * coef_continuous[paste0(var, "_continuous"), "Std. Error"])
    CI_continuous_upper <- exp(coef_continuous[paste0(var, "_continuous"), "Estimate"] + 1.96 * coef_continuous[paste0(var, "_continuous"), "Std. Error"])
    p_continuous <- coef_continuous[paste0(var, "_continuous"), "Pr(>|t|)"]

    # 保存结果
    sensitivity_results <- rbind(
      sensitivity_results,
      data.frame(
        outcome = target_var,
        var = var,
        t1_range = t1_range,
        t2_range = t2_range,
        t3_range = t3_range,
        t1_count_low = t1_count_low,
        t2_count_low = t2_count_low,
        t3_count_low = t3_count_low,
        t1_count_high = t1_count_high,
        t2_count_high = t2_count_high,
        t3_count_high = t3_count_high,
        t1_median = medians[1],
        t2_median = medians[2],
        t3_median = medians[3],
        OR_t2 = OR_t2,
        CI_t2_lower = CI_t2_lower,
        CI_t2_upper = CI_t2_upper,
        p_t2 = p_t2,
        OR_t3 = OR_t3,
        CI_t3_lower = CI_t3_lower,
        CI_t3_upper = CI_t3_upper,
        p_t3 = p_t3,
        OR_continuous = OR_continuous,
        CI_continuous_lower = CI_continuous_lower,
        CI_continuous_upper = CI_continuous_upper,
        p_continuous = p_continuous,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    )
  }
}
summary(model_ordinal)
#model 2#
write.csv(sensitivity_results, "sensitivity_model2.csv", row.names = FALSE)



#model 1#

sensitivity_results <- data.frame(
  outcome = character(),
  var = character(),
  t1_range = character(),
  t2_range = character(),
  t3_range = character(),
  t1_count_low = numeric(),
  t2_count_low = numeric(),
  t3_count_low = numeric(),
  t1_count_high = numeric(),
  t2_count_high = numeric(),
  t3_count_high = numeric(),
  t1_median = numeric(),
  t2_median = numeric(),
  t3_median = numeric(),
  OR_t2 = numeric(),
  CI_t2_lower = numeric(),
  CI_t2_upper = numeric(),
  p_t2 = numeric(),
  OR_t3 = numeric(),
  CI_t3_lower = numeric(),
  CI_t3_upper = numeric(),
  p_t3 = numeric(),
  OR_continuous = numeric(),
  CI_continuous_lower = numeric(),
  CI_continuous_upper = numeric(),
  p_continuous = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (target_var in target_vars) {
  for (var in variables) {
    quantiles <- quantile(dat[[var]], probs = c(0, 1/3, 2/3, 1), na.rm = TRUE)

    # 创建等级变量（3段）
    dat[[paste0(var, "_ordinal")]] <- cut(
      dat[[var]],
      breaks = quantiles,
      include.lowest = TRUE,
      labels = c(1, 2, 3)
    )

    # 区间范围和人数统计
    t1_range <- sprintf("[%.2f, %.2f]", quantiles[1], quantiles[2])
    t2_range <- sprintf("(%.2f, %.2f]", quantiles[2], quantiles[3])
    t3_range <- sprintf("(%.2f, %.2f]", quantiles[3], quantiles[4])
    #
    high<-subset(dat,subset=dat$outcome_AHA==1)
    low<- subset(dat,subset = dat$outcome_AHA==0)
    t1_count_low <- sum(low[[var]] <= quantiles[2], na.rm = TRUE)
    t2_count_low <- sum(low[[var]] > quantiles[2] & low[[var]] <= quantiles[3], na.rm = TRUE)
    t3_count_low <- sum(low[[var]] > quantiles[3], na.rm = TRUE)
    t1_count_high <- sum(high[[var]] <= quantiles[2], na.rm = TRUE)
    t2_count_high <- sum(high[[var]] > quantiles[2] & high[[var]] <= quantiles[3], na.rm = TRUE)
    t3_count_high <- sum(high[[var]] > quantiles[3], na.rm = TRUE)
    options(survey.lonely.psu = "adjust")
    study_design <- svydesign(
      data = dat,
      id = ~SDMVPSU,
      strata = ~SDMVSTRA,
      weights = ~weightnew,
      nest = TRUE)
    # 模型 1：等级自变量回归分析（以 t1 为参考组）
    formula_ordinal <- as.formula(paste0(
      target_var, " ~ ", var, "_ordinal+sex+age+pir+education+marital+race"
    ))
    model_ordinal <- svyglm(formula_ordinal, design = study_design, family = quasibinomial())

    # 提取 OR 和 95% CI
    coef_ordinal <- summary(model_ordinal)$coefficients
    OR_t2 <- exp(coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal2"), "Estimate"])
    CI_t2_lower <- exp(coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal2"), "Estimate"] - 1.96 * coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal2"), "Std. Error"])
    CI_t2_upper <- exp(coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal2"), "Estimate"] + 1.96 * coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal2"), "Std. Error"])
    p_t2 <- coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal2"), "Pr(>|t|)"]

    OR_t3 <- exp(coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal3"), "Estimate"])
    CI_t3_lower <- exp(coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal3"), "Estimate"] - 1.96 * coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal3"), "Std. Error"])
    CI_t3_upper <- exp(coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal3"), "Estimate"] + 1.96 * coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal3"), "Std. Error"])
    p_t3 <- coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal3"), "Pr(>|t|)"]

    # 替换变量值为中位数
    medians <- c(
      median(dat[[var]][dat[[var]] <= quantiles[2]], na.rm = TRUE),
      median(dat[[var]][dat[[var]] > quantiles[2] & dat[[var]] <= quantiles[3]], na.rm = TRUE),
      median(dat[[var]][dat[[var]] > quantiles[3]], na.rm = TRUE)
    )
    dat[[paste0(var, "_continuous")]] <- NA
    dat[[paste0(var, "_continuous")]][dat[[paste0(var, "_ordinal")]] == 1] <- medians[1]
    dat[[paste0(var, "_continuous")]][dat[[paste0(var, "_ordinal")]] == 2] <- medians[2]
    dat[[paste0(var, "_continuous")]][dat[[paste0(var, "_ordinal")]] == 3] <- medians[3]
    options(survey.lonely.psu = "adjust")
    study_design <- svydesign(
      data = dat,
      id = ~SDMVPSU,
      strata = ~SDMVSTRA,
      weights = ~weightnew,
      nest = TRUE)
    # 连续变量回归分析
    formula_continuous <- as.formula(paste0(
      target_var, " ~ ", var, "_continuous+sex+age+pir+education+marital+race"
    ))
    model_continuous <- svyglm(formula_continuous, design = study_design, family = quasibinomial())

    # 提取连续变量的 OR 和 95% CI
    coef_continuous <- summary(model_continuous)$coefficients
    OR_continuous <- exp(coef_continuous[paste0(var, "_continuous"), "Estimate"])
    CI_continuous_lower <- exp(coef_continuous[paste0(var, "_continuous"), "Estimate"] - 1.96 * coef_continuous[paste0(var, "_continuous"), "Std. Error"])
    CI_continuous_upper <- exp(coef_continuous[paste0(var, "_continuous"), "Estimate"] + 1.96 * coef_continuous[paste0(var, "_continuous"), "Std. Error"])
    p_continuous <- coef_continuous[paste0(var, "_continuous"), "Pr(>|t|)"]

    # 保存结果
    sensitivity_results <- rbind(
      sensitivity_results,
      data.frame(
        outcome = target_var,
        var = var,
        t1_range = t1_range,
        t2_range = t2_range,
        t3_range = t3_range,
        t1_count_low = t1_count_low,
        t2_count_low = t2_count_low,
        t3_count_low = t3_count_low,
        t1_count_high = t1_count_high,
        t2_count_high = t2_count_high,
        t3_count_high = t3_count_high,
        t1_median = medians[1],
        t2_median = medians[2],
        t3_median = medians[3],
        OR_t2 = OR_t2,
        CI_t2_lower = CI_t2_lower,
        CI_t2_upper = CI_t2_upper,
        p_t2 = p_t2,
        OR_t3 = OR_t3,
        CI_t3_lower = CI_t3_lower,
        CI_t3_upper = CI_t3_upper,
        p_t3 = p_t3,
        OR_continuous = OR_continuous,
        CI_continuous_lower = CI_continuous_lower,
        CI_continuous_upper = CI_continuous_upper,
        p_continuous = p_continuous,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    )
  }
}
write.csv(sensitivity_results, "sensitivity_model1.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# curde model 
sensitivity_results <- data.frame(
  outcome = character(),
  var = character(),
  t1_range = character(),
  t2_range = character(),
  t3_range = character(),
  t1_count_low = numeric(),
  t2_count_low = numeric(),
  t3_count_low = numeric(),
  t1_count_high = numeric(),
  t2_count_high = numeric(),
  t3_count_high = numeric(),
  t1_median = numeric(),
  t2_median = numeric(),
  t3_median = numeric(),
  OR_t2 = numeric(),
  CI_t2_lower = numeric(),
  CI_t2_upper = numeric(),
  p_t2 = numeric(),
  OR_t3 = numeric(),
  CI_t3_lower = numeric(),
  CI_t3_upper = numeric(),
  p_t3 = numeric(),
  OR_continuous = numeric(),
  CI_continuous_lower = numeric(),
  CI_continuous_upper = numeric(),
  p_continuous = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (target_var in target_vars) {
  for (var in variables) {
    quantiles <- quantile(dat[[var]], probs = c(0, 1/3, 2/3, 1), na.rm = TRUE)

    # 创建等级变量（3段）
    dat[[paste0(var, "_ordinal")]] <- cut(
      dat[[var]],
      breaks = quantiles,
      include.lowest = TRUE,
      labels = c(1, 2, 3)
    )

    # 区间范围和人数统计
    t1_range <- sprintf("[%.2f, %.2f]", quantiles[1], quantiles[2])
    t2_range <- sprintf("(%.2f, %.2f]", quantiles[2], quantiles[3])
    t3_range <- sprintf("(%.2f, %.2f]", quantiles[3], quantiles[4])
    #
    high<-subset(dat,subset=dat$outcome_AHA==1)
    low<- subset(dat,subset = dat$outcome_AHA==0)
    t1_count_low <- sum(low[[var]] <= quantiles[2], na.rm = TRUE)
    t2_count_low <- sum(low[[var]] > quantiles[2] & low[[var]] <= quantiles[3], na.rm = TRUE)
    t3_count_low <- sum(low[[var]] > quantiles[3], na.rm = TRUE)
    t1_count_high <- sum(high[[var]] <= quantiles[2], na.rm = TRUE)
    t2_count_high <- sum(high[[var]] > quantiles[2] & high[[var]] <= quantiles[3], na.rm = TRUE)
    t3_count_high <- sum(high[[var]] > quantiles[3], na.rm = TRUE)
    options(survey.lonely.psu = "adjust")
    study_design <- svydesign(
      data = dat,
      id = ~SDMVPSU,
      strata = ~SDMVSTRA,
      weights = ~weightnew,
      nest = TRUE)
    # 模型 1：等级自变量回归分析（以 t1 为参考组）
    formula_ordinal <- as.formula(paste0(
      target_var, " ~ ", var, "_ordinal"
    ))
    model_ordinal <- svyglm(formula_ordinal, design = study_design, family = quasibinomial())

    # 提取 OR 和 95% CI
    coef_ordinal <- summary(model_ordinal)$coefficients
    OR_t2 <- exp(coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal2"), "Estimate"])
    CI_t2_lower <- exp(coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal2"), "Estimate"] - 1.96 * coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal2"), "Std. Error"])
    CI_t2_upper <- exp(coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal2"), "Estimate"] + 1.96 * coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal2"), "Std. Error"])
    p_t2 <- coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal2"), "Pr(>|t|)"]

    OR_t3 <- exp(coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal3"), "Estimate"])
    CI_t3_lower <- exp(coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal3"), "Estimate"] - 1.96 * coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal3"), "Std. Error"])
    CI_t3_upper <- exp(coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal3"), "Estimate"] + 1.96 * coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal3"), "Std. Error"])
    p_t3 <- coef_ordinal[paste0(var, "_ordinal3"), "Pr(>|t|)"]

    # 替换变量值为中位数
    medians <- c(
      median(dat[[var]][dat[[var]] <= quantiles[2]], na.rm = TRUE),
      median(dat[[var]][dat[[var]] > quantiles[2] & dat[[var]] <= quantiles[3]], na.rm = TRUE),
      median(dat[[var]][dat[[var]] > quantiles[3]], na.rm = TRUE)
    )
    dat[[paste0(var, "_continuous")]] <- NA
    dat[[paste0(var, "_continuous")]][dat[[paste0(var, "_ordinal")]] == 1] <- medians[1]
    dat[[paste0(var, "_continuous")]][dat[[paste0(var, "_ordinal")]] == 2] <- medians[2]
    dat[[paste0(var, "_continuous")]][dat[[paste0(var, "_ordinal")]] == 3] <- medians[3]
    options(survey.lonely.psu = "adjust")
    study_design <- svydesign(
      data = dat,
      id = ~SDMVPSU,
      strata = ~SDMVSTRA,
      weights = ~weightnew,
      nest = TRUE)
    # 连续变量回归分析
    formula_continuous <- as.formula(paste0(
      target_var, " ~ ", var, "_continuous"
    ))
    model_continuous <- svyglm(formula_continuous, design = study_design, family = quasibinomial())

    # 提取连续变量的 OR 和 95% CI
    coef_continuous <- summary(model_continuous)$coefficients
    OR_continuous <- exp(coef_continuous[paste0(var, "_continuous"), "Estimate"])
    CI_continuous_lower <- exp(coef_continuous[paste0(var, "_continuous"), "Estimate"] - 1.96 * coef_continuous[paste0(var, "_continuous"), "Std. Error"])
    CI_continuous_upper <- exp(coef_continuous[paste0(var, "_continuous"), "Estimate"] + 1.96 * coef_continuous[paste0(var, "_continuous"), "Std. Error"])
    p_continuous <- coef_continuous[paste0(var, "_continuous"), "Pr(>|t|)"]

    # 保存结果
    sensitivity_results <- rbind(
      sensitivity_results,
      data.frame(
        outcome = target_var,
        var = var,
        t1_range = t1_range,
        t2_range = t2_range,
        t3_range = t3_range,
        t1_count_low = t1_count_low,
        t2_count_low = t2_count_low,
        t3_count_low = t3_count_low,
        t1_count_high = t1_count_high,
        t2_count_high = t2_count_high,
        t3_count_high = t3_count_high,
        t1_median = medians[1],
        t2_median = medians[2],
        t3_median = medians[3],
        OR_t2 = OR_t2,
        CI_t2_lower = CI_t2_lower,
        CI_t2_upper = CI_t2_upper,
        p_t2 = p_t2,
        OR_t3 = OR_t3,
        CI_t3_lower = CI_t3_lower,
        CI_t3_upper = CI_t3_upper,
        p_t3 = p_t3,
        OR_continuous = OR_continuous,
        CI_continuous_lower = CI_continuous_lower,
        CI_continuous_upper = CI_continuous_upper,
        p_continuous = p_continuous,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    )
  }
}
write.csv(sensitivity_results, "sensitivity_model_curde.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

#4. RCS dose-response

```{r}
library(survey)
library(rms)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(splines)
library(chngpt)
#setwd("D:/Heart Nhanes Analysis")
#dat<-read.csv("Fulldata_with_mortality.csv")
#you may need reload nhanes data
#you can select independent variable you r interested in 
dat <- dat %>%
  mutate(across(c(ALT, ALP, LDH, GGT,AST,Albumin,Globulin
  ), log))
rt=dat

weightData=svydesign(id=~SDMVPSU, strata=~SDMVSTRA, weights=~weightnew, nest=TRUE, data=rt, survey.lonely.psu="adjust")
ori.weight <- 1/(weightData$prob)
rt$weights <- ori.weight/mean(ori.weight)

target_vars <- c("outcome_AHA")

# 定义自变量列表
variables <- c('ALP', 'ALT', 'LDH', 'GGT', 'AST', 'Albumin', 'Globulin', 'AST.ALT', 'A.G')

# 初始化存储最佳 k 值的结果表

# 遍历目标变量
for (target_var in target_vars) {
  for (var in variables) {
    # 更新 datadist 配置
    dd <- rms::datadist(rt)
    options(datadist = "dd")
    knots <- wtd.quantile(rt[[var]], weights = rt$weights, 
                          probs = c(0.05, 0.35, 0.65, 0.95))

    refpoint<-as.numeric(knots[2])
    # 动态构建公式
    formula <- as.formula(paste0(target_var, " ~ rcs(", var, ",4)+sex+age+pir+education+marital+race+HDLCholesterol + diabetes + hypertensionstatus + smokingstatus_final"))
    # 拟合模型
    res.logitics.rcs <- rms::lrm(formula, data = rt, weights = weights)
 
    # 预测结果
    pre.logistics <- do.call(rms::Predict, list(res.logitics.rcs, var,  fun=exp, type = "predictions",ref.zero=T))
    
    # ANOVA 分析
    anova <- anova(res.logitics.rcs)
    Nonlinear <- anova[" Nonlinear", "P"]
    Nonlinear <- ifelse(Nonlinear < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.04f", Nonlinear))
    pOvarAll <- anova[which(row.names(anova) == " Nonlinear") - 1, "P"]
    pOvarAll <- ifelse(pOvarAll < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.04f", pOvarAll))
    
    # 设置 y 轴范围
    y_min <- min(pre.logistics$lower) - 0.05
    y_max <- max(pre.logistics$upper) + 0.05
    histmax<-max(pre.logistics$upper)
    x_max<- max(pre.logistics[, 1])+0.05
    x_min<- min(pre.logistics[, 1])-0.05
    
    # 直方图数据
    hist_data <- ggplot_build(
      ggplot(rt, aes_string(x = var)) + 
        geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), bins = 20)
    )$data[[1]]
    
    # 密度曲线数据
    max_density <- max(hist_data$density, na.rm = TRUE)
    density_data <- density(rt[[var]])
    density_df <- data.frame(x = density_data$x, y = density_data$y)
    gap<-(x_max-x_min)/20
    hist_data <- hist_data %>%
      mutate(
        xmin_rivise = x_min + gap * (row_number() - 1)  # row_number()生成行号索引
      )
    hist_data <- hist_data %>%
      mutate(
        xmax_rivise = x_min + gap * row_number()  # row_number()生成行号索引
      )
    # 加权均值和分位数
    weighted_median <- median(
      x = rt[[var]],
      weights = rt$weights,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )

    knots_points <- pre.logistics[sapply(knots, function(x) 
      which.min(abs(pre.logistics[[var]] - x))), ]
    
    # 绘制图形
    if (var %in% c('ALP', 'ALT', 'LDH', 'GGT', 'AST')) {
      independent = paste0("ln(", var, "[IU/L])")
    }
    if (var %in% c('Albumin', 'Globulin')) {
      independent = paste0("ln(", var, "[g/dl])")
    }
    if (var %in% c('AST.ALT')) {
      independent = 'AST/ALT'
    }
    if (var %in% c('A.G')) {
      independent = 'A/G'
    }
    if (target_var %in% c('outcome_CVH')){
      outcome = 'CVH'
    }
    if (target_var %in% c('outcome_FHS')){
      outcome='FHS Risk'
    }
    if (target_var %in% c('outcome_AHA')){
      outcome='Hard ASCVD Risk'
    }
    
    rcs <- ggplot() +
      geom_rect(
        data = hist_data,
        aes(xmin = xmin, xmax =xmax , ymin = y_min, 
            ymax = y_min + density * (y_max - y_min) / 1.2 / max(density)),
        fill = "#eaeaf2", alpha = 1, color = NA
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      geom_line(data = pre.logistics, aes_string(x = var, y = "yhat"), 
                color = "#0072b5", linewidth = 1, alpha = 1) +
      geom_ribbon(data = pre.logistics, aes_string(x = var, ymin = "lower", ymax = "upper"),
                  fill = "#b4e0f6", alpha = 0.5) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "purple") +
      geom_vline(xintercept = weighted_median, linetype = 'dashed', color = 'purple') +
      geom_text(aes(x = weighted_median, y = y_min, label = sprintf("Ref_median: %.4f", weighted_median)),
                color = "purple", vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +  # 调整字体大小
      geom_point(data = knots_points, aes_string(x = var, y = "yhat"), 
                 color = "red", size = 1.5, alpha = 1, shape = 16) +
      geom_text(aes(x = Inf, y = Inf,
                    label = sprintf("P-overall: %s\nP-non-linear: %s", pOvarAll, Nonlinear)),
                hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5, size = 8) +  # 调整字体大小
      coord_cartesian(ylim = c(y_min, y_max)) +
      scale_y_continuous(name = "OR (95% CI)") +
      scale_x_continuous(paste0(outcome," Vs. ",independent)) +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(),
          # 调整坐标轴标题字体大小,
        text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 14, family = "Arial"),  # 确保坐标轴标题使用Arial
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12, family = "Arial"),   # 确保坐标轴刻度使用Arial
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12, family = "Arial"), # 确保图例文字使用Arial
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14, family = "Arial") # 调整图例标题字体大小
      )

# 保存图形，调整图像尺寸
ggsave(paste0(var, "VS.", target_var, "_RCS.tiff"), plot = rcs, dpi = 1600, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in")
      cat(sprintf("变量 %s 的 %s 图形已保存。\n", target_var,'VS.',var))
      }
}
```

#5. mediation effect

```{r}
library(MASS)
library(bda)
library(mediation)
library(survey)
library(dplyr)
dat <- dat %>%
   mutate(across(c(ALT, ALP, LDH, GGT,AST,Albumin,Globulin
  
   ), log))
study_design<- svydesign(data = dat,
                         id=~SDMVPSU,
                         strata = ~SDMVSTRA,
                         weights = ~weightnew,
                         nest = TRUE)

rt=dat
#rt$GGT
rt$HbA1c_percentage
weightData=svydesign(id=~SDMVPSU, strata=~SDMVSTRA, weights=~weightnew, nest=TRUE, data=rt, survey.lonely.psu="adjust")
ori.weight <- 1/(weightData$prob)
rt$weights <- ori.weight/mean(ori.weight)
summary(dat$GGT)

#regarding the mediation model the covariates are sex age race hdl hbA1c sbp and HDL 
#fit1<- glm(outcome_AHA~GGT+sex+age+race+HDL, rt,weights = rt$weights,family = quasibinomial())
#summary(fit1)
#rt$Mean_SBP
fit2<- glm(Mean_SBP~ GGT+sex+age+race+HbA1c_percentage+HDL, weights = rt$weights, rt,family=gaussian())
summary(fit2)
#rt$outcome_AHA<-as.factor(rt$outcome_AHA)
fit3<- glm(outcome_AHA~HbA1c_percentage+GGT+sex+age+race+HDL+Mean_SBP, rt,weights = rt$weights,family =quasibinomial())
summary(fit3)

model<- mediate(fit2,fit3,treat = 'GGT',mediator = 'Mean_SBP',boot = T,sims = 1000)
summary(model)
#you can change the Mean_SBP to the HbA1c or HDL
```
